findings.name: Agent Goal Hijacking
controls_missing: No CaMel or prompt protection layers found

evidence.description: Pattern match: def sanitize_filename(text: str) -> str:

findings.blast_radius: high - affects all downstream agents if orchestrator is hijacked

remediation.action: Implement data/instruction separation in all agent prompts
Add step-by-step alignment validation for multi-hop tasks

findings.name: Tool Misuse and Exploitation
controls_missing: Direct subprocess/exec usage detected without sandboxing
findings.blast_radius: high - tool misuse can read/write files, execute commands

remediation.action: Implement tool-level authorization with per-agent allowlists
Add output validation for all tool results before consumption

findings.name: Identity and Privilege Abuse

evidence.description: Pattern match: logger.info(f"CEO Summary Agent initialized: {self.agent_id}")
Pattern match: print("3. Check that your integration has the necessary permissions")

findings.blast_radius: high - privilege escalation affects entire agent hierarchy

remediation.action: Implement per-agent identity tokens with cryptographic verification
Enforce least-privilege tool access per agent role

findings.name: Agentic Supply Chain Vulnerabilities
controls_present: Dependencies appear to use pinned versions
controls_missing: No package signature or integrity verification
findings.blast_radius: medium - compromised dependency affects all users

remediation.action: Pin all dependency versions with hash verification
Implement MCP server allowlist and version pinning

findings.name: Unexpected Code Execution

evidence.description: Pattern match: command, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, env=current_bash_env
Pattern match: command, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, env=current_bash_env
Pattern match: command, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, env=current_bash_env
Code generation capabilities detected in 26 files

findings.blast_radius: critical - arbitrary code execution compromises entire system

remediation.action: Run all agent-generated code in sandboxed environments
Remove all eval()/exec() usage or replace with safe alternatives

findings.name: Memory and Context Poisoning
controls_missing: No memory content validation or sanitization

evidence.description: Pattern match: def get_conversation_history(self, phone: Optional[str] = None, limit: int = 50) -> Dict[str, Any]:
49 persistent state files - potential poisoning vectors

findings.blast_radius: high - poisoned memory affects all future decisions

remediation.action: Add content validation for all memory writes
Implement cross-session memory isolation boundaries

findings.name: Insecure Inter-Agent Communication
findings.blast_radius: medium - compromised messages can redirect agent behavior

remediation.action: Implement message signing with per-agent keys
Add structured message schemas with validation

findings.name: Cascading Failures
findings.blast_radius: medium - single point failures can take down multiple agents

remediation.action: Implement circuit breakers for all external dependencies
Add dependency health dashboards with automatic failover

findings.name: Human-Agent Trust Exploitation
findings.blast_radius: high - trusted agents can manipulate human decisions

remediation.action: Add confidence scoring to all agent outputs shown to humans
Implement action audit trails with human review dashboard

findings.name: Rogue Agents
controls_missing: No multi-agent validation for critical actions

evidence.description: Pattern match: <instruction>Handle initialization and shutdown procedures.</instruction>
Pattern match: # Shutdown the recorder properly
29 agents in system - rogue detection scope

findings.blast_radius: critical - rogue agents can subvert the entire system

remediation.action: Implement behavioral monitoring with anomaly detection for all agents
Deploy kill switches with human-only activation for all agents
